title: Rich Savory Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and savory Norwegian lamb stew featuring unique ingredients like toffee popcorn, served with a flambe touch, and low-glycemic friendly options.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat, then add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides.
Remove the browned lamb from the pot and set aside, then add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the lamb broth, thyme, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine, then return the browned lamb to the pot.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
While the stew is cooking, prepare the toffee popcorn according to the package instructions, using a low-glycemic sweetener.
After the stew has cooked for 1.5 hours, stir in the flambe liquid and ignite the liquid, allowing it to burn for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Stir in the prepared toffee popcorn and continue to simmer the stew for an additional 10 minutes, allowing the flavors to combine.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
